name: Egocentric AI
description: Developing AI systems that understand the world from a first-person perspective, enabling applications in AR and robotics.

name: Multi-Modal LLM
description: Exploring the fusion of text, images, and audio to build more comprehensive and context-aware language models.

name: Speech Recognition
description: Improving the accuracy and robustness of speech-to-text systems, especially in noisy and diverse environments.

name: AI in Healthcare
description: Integrating Artificial Intelligence with the Internet of Things to create smarter, more efficient, and Healthcare systems.
